## Discussion

A [doc://com.apple.compositorservices/documentation/CompositorServices/cp_layer_renderer_capabilities_t] type  stores information about what options the layer currently supports. When specifying the configuration details for your layer, use the information in this type to verify your configuration is valid.

# cp_layer_renderer_capabilities_t

**Type Alias**

A type that stores the texture formats and options the layer supports.

## Declaration

```swift
typedef CP_OBJECT_cp_layer_renderer_capabilities * cp_layer_renderer_capabilities_t;
```

## Discussion

A [doc://com.apple.compositorservices/documentation/CompositorServices/cp_layer_renderer_capabilities_t] type  stores information about what options the layer currently supports. When specifying the configuration details for your layer, use the information in this type to verify your configuration is valid.
title: cp_layer_renderer_capabilities_t
